title: geophila repens
intro: Geophila repens, also known as Creeping Jenny, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant with yellow flowers that bloom in the spring. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Geophila repens include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory tract infections, such as coughs and colds. Geophila repens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
